avocado.jpg.alt: Half avocado with pit on pink background. Minimalist, clean tone. Dominant colors: green, brown, pink. Best for a product card or hero image.

bowl.jpg.alt: Colorful healthy poke bowl with tofu and vegetables. Fresh, vibrant tone. Dominant greens, reds, and purples. Best used as a product or gallery image.

businessjournal.jpg.alt: Close-up of a financial newspaper. Professional, analytical tone. Dominant colors are white, blue, and grey. Best used as a hero image for finance websites.

catandog.jpg.alt: Cuddling cat and dog on grass; cozy, heartwarming tone. Dominant colors: brown, cream, green. Best for a hero image in pet care websites.

city.jpg.alt: Golden hour New York City skyline. Warm, professional tone with gold and grey hues. Ideal as a high-impact website hero image for corporate services.

citystreet.jpg.alt: Urban city street with skyscrapers and yellow taxis. Moody, cinematic tone. Dominant grays and yellows. Best for a website hero image or background.

clothes.jpg.alt: Flat lay of white shirt, blue jeans, striped top, and red shoes. Casual, bright tone. White, blue, red. Best for a product card.

cow.jpg.alt: A curious calf stands in golden grass against a pale sky. Rustic, serene tone. Earthy browns and muted whites. Best for a hero image.

dog.jpg.alt: Close-up of a curious tricolor dog against pink. Playful tone; black, white, tan, and pink colors. Ideal for a pet service hero image.

dog1.jpg.alt: Cute French Bulldog in yellow/white hoodie against blue backdrop. Playful tone. Dominant colors: blue, yellow. Best for a playful hero or product card.

dog3.jpg.alt: Cute fluffy dog in banana pajamas on yellow background. Cheerful tone; yellow and blue palette. Best for a playful hero image or product card.

dogrunningsea.jpg.alt: Happy golden-brown dog on a beach at sunset. Warm, joyful tone. Dominant colors: gold, blue, white. Best for a hero image or gallery.

dressdrawing.jpg.alt: Fashion illustration sketches featuring chic figures in white and red. Artistic, sophisticated tone. Dominant colors: white, red, black. Best for a gallery asset.

dresses.jpg.alt: Clothing rack with colorful garments against a teal wall. Modern, clean tone. Dominant colors: teal, orange, pink. Best for a fashion gallery or card.

eggsalad.jpg.alt: Rustic breakfast toast with eggs and avocado on dark stone. Moody, organic tone; greens, yellows, blacks. Best for a food blog hero image.

empirestatedusk.jpg.alt: New York City skyline at sunset featuring the Empire State Building. Moody, serene tone. Deep blues, oranges, and blacks. Best for a hero image.

excavator.jpg.alt: Yellow excavator on grey rocky terrain against mountains. Industrial, rugged tone. Dominant colors: yellow, grey, green. Best for a construction company hero image.

farm.jpg.alt: Rustic red barn amidst autumn trees; peaceful, rural mood. Dominant colors: red, green, gold. Best for a website hero image or nature gallery.

flatironstreetfast.jpg.alt: Dynamic shot of the Flatiron Building with motion-blurred taxis. Urban, energetic tone; blue and gold palette. Best as a high-impact website hero image.

flowerfield.jpg.alt: Vibrant field of red poppies and blue cornflowers under a sunny sky. Cheerful, natural tone. Red, blue, green. Best for a hero image.

housedusk.jpg.alt: Warmly lit wooden chalet at twilight; cozy, luxurious mood. Dominant browns, deep blues, gold. Best as a hero image for luxury travel or rentals.

houseinteriorplants.jpg.alt: Modern living room with warm tones, gold accents, and greenery. Sophisticated, cozy mood. Dominant colors: ochre, cream, gold. Best for a hero image.

housekeychain.jpg.alt: A miniature house with keys on a wooden table. Professional, clean tone. Dominant colors: white, red, grey. Best for real estate hero or cards.

icecream.jpg.alt: Hand holding a pink and white ice cream cone against yellow. Playful, vibrant tone. Dominant colors: yellow, pink. Best for a product card.

interiorhousedog.jpg.alt: Cozy living room with a French Bulldog on a rug. Warm, serene tone. Sage green, yellow, brown. Best for lifestyle blog hero image.

laptopwork.jpg.alt: Top-down view of a person managing finances with a laptop and calculator. Professional, focused tone. White and neutral tones. Best for hero image.

meetingroom.jpg.alt: Modern office meeting room with professionals; professional, focused tone. Dominant colors: white, grey, black. Best use case: hero image for corporate services page.

menoutfit.jpg.alt: Two models in edgy black streetwear against a blue sky. Moody, urban tone. Dominant colors: black, blue. Best for a fashion hero image.

modernhousepool.jpg.alt: Modern luxury villa with pool; bright, sophisticated tone. Dominant white, blue, and grey. Best for a real estate hero image or luxury gallery.

orangerobots.jpg.alt: Industrial orange robotic arms in a bright factory setting. High-tech, efficient tone. Dominant colors: orange, grey. Best use case: hero image for technology/manufacturing.

pancakes.jpg.alt: Syrup pouring over banana pancakes. Moody, rustic tone with gold and dark grey tones. Ideal as a high-impact hero image for food blogs.

pizza.jpg.alt: Rustic BBQ chicken pizza with pineapple on wood. Warm, appetizing tone; browns, golds, reds. Best as a high-impact hero image for food websites.

presentation.jpg.alt: Smiling redhead woman by whiteboard; professional yet friendly tone. Dominant colors: white, black, skin tones. Best for a "Team" or "About Us" hero section.

tshirts.jpg.alt: Six folded t-shirts in red, black, white, navy, maroon, and yellow on wood. Clean, commercial tone. Primary colors. Best for a product gallery.

twodogs.jpg.alt: Two happy dogs on a patterned rug. Cheerful tone; cream, black, and deep red. Best for a pet-services hero image or gallery asset.

vintagehouse.jpg.alt: Small white cottage under a blue sky. Peaceful, rustic tone. Dominant colors: white, green, blue. Best for a heritage site hero image or gallery.

warehouse.jpg.alt: Industrial warehouse interior with equipment; gritty, functional tone. Dominant colors: grey, orange, green. Best use case: hero image for construction or logistics services.

workwhiteblack.jpg.alt: B&W photo of two colleagues collaborating over laptops. Professional, focused tone. Grayscale palette. Ideal as a hero image for corporate or tech services pages.

yellowoutfit.jpg.alt: Confident woman in yellow cropped sweatsuit against blue sky. Bold, vibrant tone. Dominant colors: yellow, cyan. Best for a fashion hero image or gallery.
